title: Contact Me | Alan Gemmell MP
headings: h2: Delivering for our towns and villages
text_excerpt: --> Contact Me | Alan Gemmell MP top of page Menu Close Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter ALAN'S WORK Contact Me Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here ​ In addition, I do not accept enquiries from constituents via social media platforms, all cases should be sent to be through email, telephone, post, or one of the forms on this site. ​ For the safety of my team, I am currently unable to allow constituents to drop-in to my constituency office, this address may only be used for postal enquiries. Should you wish you speak to me in person reach out and I will do my best to arrange a surgery appointment. Contact me First name * Last name * Address * Email * Phone Message * Yes, subscribe me to your newsletter. Submit Inviting me to an event? I welcome the change to visit local groups, organisations, businesses, and schools in Central Ayrshire. If you are inviting me to a meeting or event click the button below and fill out a quick form. Invite Me to an Event Promoted by Annabel Ainsworth on behalf of Alan Gemmell MP, both at Suite 5, Sovereign House, Irvine, KA12 8RL Delivering for our towns and villages ​ Privacy Policy © 2026 Alan Gemmell Home How can I help?
